rows.label: qev086414_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Mo? Friend want to know what
dadapon of Mumutsu is like?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086414_MSG0002
rows.name:
About 50,000 times cooler
than big brotherpon! ...And
million times more in debt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086414_MSG0003
rows.name:
Mumutsu was sure big brotherpon would
come home all full of Bias bite marks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086414_MSG0004
rows.name:
But thanks to friends,
he look good as new![ST:wait ]
